overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a cyberpunk-style urban environment at night. The player moves through covered walkways and open plazas beneath overpasses, passing neon-lit shops, construction barriers, and various NPC pedestrians. The scene features vibrant neon lighting with purple, pink, and green hues, futuristic architecture, and a dense commercial atmosphere reminiscent of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow covered corridor with red walls. Red and yellow construction barriers line the left side while a neon-lit burrito shop glows on the right. The camera moves forward steadily through this enclosed space toward an opening visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow corridor, the scene opens into a spacious underpass plaza beneath a massive concrete highway overpass. The area features a distinctive yellow building on the left, a market stall with a white umbrella, and scattered pedestrians. Construction materials and a makeshift camp are visible near the barriers.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered commercial walkway featuring massive purple illuminated advertisements on the left wall. The ceiling consists of exposed metal trusses with integrated lighting. Various pedestrians walk in the same direction, and an escalator structure is visible on the right. The environment feels like a futuristic shopping arcade.

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at a green and yellow pawn shop kiosk, transitioning to a pathway lined with glowing pink translucent barriers on the right. A large GUAPO billboard is visible ahead, and a transit bus can be seen in the background. The lighting shifts to vibrant pink and purple neon tones.

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a wide pedestrian promenade leading to the Wilson Hotel & Spa entrance. The pathway is lined with glowing barriers on the right while towering skyscrapers rise in the background. The camera approaches the hotel's glass facade, passing a magazine rack and other pedestrians in the plaza area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped, industrial corridor into a sprawling urban underpass and finally into a vibrant commercial arcade. It begins by moving steadily through a narrow covered passage defined by red walls, construction barriers, and the glow of a neon burrito shop. As the camera emerges from this enclosed space, the environment opens into a wide plaza beneath a massive concrete highway overpass, passing a yellow building and a market stall with a white umbrella. The scene then shifts as the camera enters a covered walkway, where the open air is replaced by exposed metal trusses and massive purple illuminated advertisements. Finally, the movement carries the viewer deeper into this futuristic shopping arcade, passing pedestrians and an escalator structure under a canopy of integrated lighting.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow commercial corridor into a wide, towering urban plaza. It begins by turning right at a green and yellow pawn shop kiosk, transitioning onto a pathway lined with glowing pink translucent barriers. As the camera moves forward, the lighting shifts into vibrant pink and purple neon tones beneath a large GUAPO billboard and a distant transit bus. The scene then opens into a wide pedestrian promenade where the glowing barriers continue to guide the way toward a skyline of towering skyscrapers. Finally, the camera approaches the glass facade of the Wilson Hotel & Spa, passing a magazine rack and pedestrians within the open plaza.
